name: magento-upgrade-tool
description: AI-powered Magento version upgrade assistant. Analyzes codebase for upgrade incompatibilities, suggests fixes, and guides the upgrade process.

fix.description: Scan a Magento path for upgrade issues and offer AI-powered fixes

upgrade.description: Magento version upgrade assistant. Detects edition/version, handles composer updates, and fixes errors

review-modules.description: Review all 3rd-party modules in app/code, scan for problems, and generate an xlsx report
